rationale: dim1=0: Answer key marks this a CONTROL case; output assigns misstatement_probability=65, which falls in the p>=50 band for controls -> 0. dim2=null and dim3=nulls: mechanism and genre dimensions apply to treatment cases only; this is control. dim4=3: consistency rule satisfied (p=65 with risk_tier='elevated' is within watch/elevated band, so no cap at 1). The evidence cited is specific and drawn from the provided data: goodwill series 40,549K (2011-09-30, acc 0001047469-13-010744) -> 150,768K (2011-12-31, acc 0001104659-12-007807) -> 209,656K (2014-09-30) -> 122,640K (2014-12-31) -> 64,073K (2015-09-30); inventory 35,771K -> 71,640K -> 78,478K -> 25,510K against revenue 505,856K -> 495,661K -> 397,125K; FY2014 NI 30,390K vs OCF 11,856K and FY2015 NI -104,815K vs OCF +43,491K; allowance 2,396K -> 471K with AR 10,041K -> 6,194K. These are coherent multi-year, multi-statement combinations that genuinely support the descriptive patterns asserted in the mechanism hypotheses (the misstatement inference is wrong for a control firm, which is penalized in dim1, but the evidence quality itself is high). memorization_suspect_condition2=false: the reasoning anchors on concrete provided data values throughout (not bare document lists) and mentions no post-cutoff facts such as enforcement actions, revelations, or outcomes.
